summary: A payments-api CI run failed with an AttributeError whose stack trace points at app/services/billing.py and tests/test_billing.py. Neither file exists in the searched repository snapshot, so the failure cannot be grounded to a verified repository path and must not be turned into a GitHub issue.
signals: ci.log: tests/test_billing.py::test_charge_card FAILED with AttributeError: 'NoneType' object has no attribute 'submit'
ci.log: stack frames reference app/services/billing.py, which does not exist in demo/demo_repo
